positions.title: Software Developer Intern
positions.description: Contributed to real-world frontend development tasks, including UI implementation and bug fixing.
positions.detail:
- Practiced **Agile** methodologies through daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and iterative development.
- Learned how to work effectively in a collaborative team environment with designers and developers.
- Improved skills in **responsive design**, dynamic data handling, and deployment debugging.
- Participated in the final project demo and helped complete documentation requirements.

positions.title: Software Developer Intern
positions.description: Improved existing company code by implementing a rotating proxy for web scraping, increasing search efficiency and request count.
positions.detail:
- Developed a website for subscribing and unsubscribing from newsletters, integrating it with **Listmonk**, a self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager.
- Built both the frontend and backend and deployed it using **Docker** and **Traefik** for a streamlined workflow.
- Refactored project code structure by applying **clean code principles**, improving maintainability, and centralizing script execution using OOP practices.
- Configured deployment using **NGINX** for hosting and SSL certificates, along with Docker and Traefik for containerized management. Implemented security best practices, including **SSH hardening** and other protective measures.

positions.title: Software Developer
positions.description: Contributed to 3 projects as a backend developer.
positions.detail: - Led 1 project and provided an easy development environment via **Docker** container orchestration for various services, e.g. **PostgreSQL**, **MinIO**, **Portainer**.

positions.title: Python Instructor
positions.description: Taught Python fundamentals to high school students: variables, OOP, control flow, and functions.
positions.detail:
- Designed interactive coding sessions focused on logical thinking and problem-solving.
- Introduced students to data analysis using **Pandas** and **Matplotlib**.
